title: Cross-cutting — OCSP / CRL Revocation Infrastructure Attestation

compliance.assurance_rationale: PCI 8.3.10 — cert revocation checking integrity. Cross-cutting attestation.
IA-5(2) PKI-based authentication — revocation infra attestation.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (35102, 35201, 35103) earliest=-1d
| stats count by ocsp_responder_url, crl_repository_url, MessageCode
| eval evidence_status="revocation_infra_attestation"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously attest cross-cutting OCSP/CRL revocation infrastructure health.
value: Cross-framework attestation that ISE's PKI revocation infrastructure is operational, satisfying multiple obligations.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for the cross-cutting access-control evidence pack.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.70 operational.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.41.7: OCSP/CRL Revocation Attestation]
cron_schedule = 0 7 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.41.7,family=encryption_key_mgmt
```
grandmaExplanation: We continuously attest cross-cutting OCSP/CRL revocation infrastructure health. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.
